source_limitations: The workflow does not encode age, pregnancy, suspected versus confirmed stone, imaging modality, stone size or location, obstruction, or procedure qualifiers.

Pain, radiation, haematuria, nausea or vomiting, fever, previous-stone history, all negative or red-flag prompts, examination, urinalysis, renal function, follow-up imaging, safety-netting, referral, generic clinician plan, fixed intervals, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.

Diagnosis, obstruction or infection assessment, imaging choice, treatment, medicine or procedure selection, referral urgency, prevention content, and follow-up timing remain clinician responsibilities.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
